query: Task freshness and sync trust repair
slice_title: Add explicit task refresh mode that updates index freshness without rewriting authored task docs
goal: Record progress for `Task freshness and sync trust repair`.
description: Added ds task refresh as the explicit non-destructive task artifact recapture command. Refresh reports refreshed_artifacts instead of stale artifact_freshness, preserves authored Markdown, clears status warnings after recapture, and README now points users to refresh.

git_diff.command: git diff --stat; git diff --name-only; git diff --cached --name-only; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard
git_diff.stat:
README.md                                          |  2 +-
 devspecs/tasks/task-freshness-sync-trust/task.json |  7 +-
 internal/commands/task.go                          | 95 +++++++++++++++++-----
 internal/commands/task_test.go                     | 87 ++++++++++++++++++++
 4 files changed, 168 insertions(+), 23 deletions(-)

learnings.summary: Use ds task refresh as the visible command for non-destructive task artifact recapture; keep sync available but stop making stale warnings point users at sync.
